name: How long do I have to file a claim after getting hit by falling debris on a construction site?

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a claim after getting hit by falling debris on a construction site?

acceptedAnswer.text: Deadlines vary by state—Utah requires reporting within 180 days, while Idaho requires notice within 60 days. Filing a formal claim also has specific statutes of limitations, so you should report the incident and seek legal advice immediately to avoid losing your rights.
